highlights.headline: Memphis Grizzlies vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Memphis Grizzlies vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Memphis Grizzlies vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights) 2026/03/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Duren had 30 points and 13 rebounds and Cade Cunningham added 17 points and 15 assists as the Detroit Pistons handed the Memphis Grizzlies their seventh straight loss with a 126-110 victory on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Duren and Cade Cunningham help Detroit Pistons prolong Memphis Grizzlies losing streak

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New York Knicks vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/03/13 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson finished with 29 points and nine assists, OG Anunoby added 25 points and eight rebounds, and the New York Knicks beat the Indiana Pacers 101-92 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson scores 29, Anunoby adds 25 as Knicks get past the Pacers 101-92 for 2nd straight victory

headlines.description: — Brandon Ingram scored 36 points, RJ Barrett added 22 and the Toronto Raptors rallied to beat Phoenix 122-115 on Friday night, snapping the Suns’ winning streak at four.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ingram scores 36 points as Raptors rally to snap Suns' winning streak at 4

headlines.description: — Evan Mobley matched his season high with 29 points, Donovan Mitchell had 24 and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Dallas Mavericks 138-105 on Friday night in the opener of a home-and-home series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Evan Mobley scores 29 points and the Cavaliers rout the Mavericks 138-105

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant hit a go-ahead 18-footer with 7.6 seconds left and the Houston Rockets outlasted the New Orleans Pelicans 107-105 on Friday night to move into third place in the crowded Western Conference.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rockets outlast Pelicans 107-105 to move into 3rd place in West
